questions.question: Explain the difference between JSP scriptlet tags and expression tags with examples.
expectedPoints: Scriptlet tags (<% %>) contain Java code that is executed
Expression tags (<%= %>) output the result of expressions
Scriptlets don't produce direct output while expressions do

questions.question: Describe the complete lifecycle of an HTTP session in a JSP application and explain how to manage session timeouts.
expectedPoints: Configuring timeout in web.xml or programmatically
Best practices for session data storage
